name: rosco

about.description: NREL-developed wind turbine controller for bladed-style communications
NREL-developed wind turbine controller for bladed-style communications

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: rosco
  version: "2.10.5"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/NREL/ROSCO/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 6d7d27c33a2aeddf695d4d69ab2a6913d06360176c0ae45018d12e75a5161abd
  patches:
    - setup.patch

build:
  number: 0
  skip:
    - ${{ true if match(python, "<3.11") }}
  script:
    - if: win
      then: set "CMAKE_ARGS=-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=%LIBRARY_PREFIX%"
    - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . --no-deps -vv

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cmake
        - cmake-build-extension
        - pkg-config
    - if: not win
      then:
        - make
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
    - if: win
      then:
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}
  host:
    - cmake-build-extension
    - numpy
    - pip
    - python
    - setuptools
    - zeromq
  run:
    # Windows folks have to add control package through pip otherwise fortran library clash
    - if: not win
      then: control
    - matplotlib-base
    - numpy
    - pandas
    - pyYAML
    - pyparsing
    - python
    - pyzmq
    - scipy
    - wisdem >=3.16
    - orbit-nrel
    - openfast-io <5.0
    - windIO >=2.1.1
    - jsonmerge

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - rosco
      pip_check: false
  - files:
      source:
        - Examples
        - Examples/example_inputs
        - Examples/Test_Cases
        - Examples/Test_Cases/NREL-5MW
        - Examples/Tune_Cases
    requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - simpy
    script:
      - if: not win
        then: test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libdiscon$SHLIB_EXT
      - if: win
        then: if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\libdiscon.dll exit 1
      - if: win
        then: pip install control
      - if: not aarch64
        then: pip install dearpygui
      - cd Examples
      - python 01_turbine_model.py
      - python 04_simple_sim.py
      - cd ..

about:
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Reference OpenSource Wind Turbine Controller
  description: NREL-developed wind turbine controller for bladed-style communications
  homepage: https://github.com/NREL/rosco
  repository: https://github.com/NREL/rosco

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - nikhar-abbas
    - dzalkind
    - gbarter

about.description: NREL-developed wind turbine controller for bladed-style communications
